title: Design a Metric
description: Define a metric that actually measures what you care about.
content:
I want to measure: {{goal}}

Help me design a good metric. Propose the precise definition (numerator, denominator, window, segment), explain what behavior it would drive, and stress-test it: how could it be gamed or give a misleading signal? Suggest a guardrail metric to pair with it. Prefer a metric that's slightly harder to compute but honest over an easy one that lies.
